episodes.title: Atlas deployment stabilized after rollback
episodes.narrative: The team restored Atlas deployment stability by executing the Atlas rollback checklist and verifying production health.

episodes.title: Atlas rollback checklist reduced production risk
episodes.narrative: A careful Atlas rollback checklist caught the risky deploy step before release and kept production stable.

episodes.title: Atlas release became stable after deploy fix
episodes.narrative: Fixing the Atlas deploy sequencing issue and updating the rollback checklist made the release stable again.

episodes.title: pgvector indexing bug slowed similarity queries
episodes.narrative: The team traced pgvector indexing latency to a bad index build and repaired it.

episodes.title: pgvector indexing improved after rebuild
episodes.narrative: Rebuilding the pgvector index restored query speed and fixed the indexing drift.

episodes.title: pgvector index tuning reduced latency
episodes.narrative: Tuning the pgvector index parameters lowered retrieval latency for the similarity workload.

episodes.title: Audience privacy review tightened scoping
episodes.narrative: The privacy review hardened audience scoping rules and stopped cross audience leaks.

episodes.title: Audience scoped retrieval kept private notes hidden
episodes.narrative: Audience scoped retrieval preserved privacy by hiding private notes from the wrong person.

episodes.title: Privacy boundary checks blocked audience leakage
episodes.narrative: The privacy boundary checks prevented audience leakage in memory search.

episodes.title: Garden irrigation schedule
episodes.narrative: A note about tomato irrigation and spring gardening chores.

queries.name: atlas_deployment_stability
queries.query: Which Atlas rollback checklist changes made deployment stable?

queries.name: audience_privacy_scoping
queries.query: How did audience privacy scoping stop leaks?
